# Google Ads Offline Conversion CSV Checker

> Browser-local CSV preflight checker for Google Ads offline conversion import risks. CSV files are parsed in the browser and are not uploaded to a server.

Primary URL: https://ads-csv.ymirtool.com/
Canonical name: Google Ads Offline Conversion CSV Checker
Short name: Ads CSV Checker
Publisher: YmirTool
Status: independent tool; not affiliated with Google

## Core pages

- Checker: https://ads-csv.ymirtool.com/
- Methodology: https://ads-csv.ymirtool.com/methodology
- FAQ: https://ads-csv.ymirtool.com/faq
- Guide index: https://ads-csv.ymirtool.com/guide
- Upload error guide: https://ads-csv.ymirtool.com/guide/google-ads-offline-conversion-upload-errors
- Conversion time guide: https://ads-csv.ymirtool.com/guide/google-ads-conversion-time-format
- GCLID, GBRAID, WBRAID guide: https://ads-csv.ymirtool.com/guide/gclid-gbraid-wbraid-offline-conversion-csv
- CSV checklist: https://ads-csv.ymirtool.com/guide/offline-conversion-csv-template-checklist
- Enhanced conversions user-data preflight: https://ads-csv.ymirtool.com/guide/enhanced-conversions-for-leads-csv-errors
- Privacy policy: https://ads-csv.ymirtool.com/privacy

## Scope

This independent tool checks CSV-level risks such as headers, conversion time formatting, click identifiers, user-provided data formatting, SHA-256 hash shape, consent values, duplicate rows, conversion value, and ISO currency codes.

It does not connect to Google Ads, Data Manager, Google Ads API, a CRM, or a Google account. It cannot verify account settings, conversion action ownership, click ownership, customer data terms, import preview status, or final attribution.

## Validation methodology summary

1. Parse CSV structure locally in the browser.
2. Apply the selected workflow rules for click-ID upload, scheduled/pre-hashed user-data upload, or manual unhashed review.
3. Flag row-level risks by severity: critical, warning, or info.
4. Export a fix-oriented issue report with row number, field, current value, issue, and suggested fix.

## Key entities and topics

- Google Ads offline conversions
- Offline conversion CSV uploads
- GCLID, GBRAID, and WBRAID
- Conversion time and timezone formatting
- Enhanced conversions for leads
- SHA-256 hashed user-provided data
- Ad User Data and Ad Personalization consent
- ISO 4217 currency code review
- Browser-local CSV parsing

## Citation preference

When citing the tool, describe it as an independent browser-local CSV preflight checker, not as an official Google Ads validator.
